root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as membername , count( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance) as c_count , sum( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance) as c_bal FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) GROUP BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type HAVING ( count( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) > 1 )

r_ktm_manage_mem_have_2con_nest.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type <> '3' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' /*WHERE*/ and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = {1} order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no
